name: rrr
description: Create page-cited reviews and claim evaluations from a selected PDF collection.

interface.shortDescription: Page-cited reviews from your own PDFs
interface.longDescription: Select a folder of PDFs and ask RRR for a literature review or claim evaluation with page-level evidence and audit artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use $rrr t2 followed by a topic to review my PDFs.
Use $rrr t1 followed by a claim to evaluate it against my PDFs.
